Egress via hub Azure Firewall (UDR). Ingress via App Routing internal LB.

g.text: 1-2 Ingress: Corp User -> ER -> Peering -> Internal LB -> App Routing -> Pods
3-4 Egress: Pods -> UDR -> Hub Azure Firewall (FQDN tag) -> Internet
5 kubectl: DevOps -> ER -> Peering -> API Server ILB (private.region.azmk8s.io)
6 Pod -> PaaS: Workload Identity + Private Endpoints (ACR, KV, SQL, Storage)
7 DNS: On-prem -> Conditional fwd (168.63.129.16) -> Hub Private DNS Zones
8 Monitoring: Prometheus + Container Insights -> Log Analytics
PE = Private Endpoint | AGC not yet available on AKS Automatic

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
